mnemonics.title: Command Line Arguments
mnemonics.content: argc: argument count, argv: argument values

acronyms.usage: stores the number of command line arguments
stores the actual command line arguments

visualTips.visualization: Imagine a list of arguments passed to a program, with argc storing the number of arguments and argv storing the actual arguments.

analogies.analogy: Think of command line arguments like a recipe. Just as a recipe requires specific ingredients and instructions, a program requires specific arguments to run correctly.
